summary.title: 准备 cxs 0.3.5 release PR
summary.what: 将 @act0r/cxs 的 package.json 与 package-lock.json 从 0.3.4 bump 到 0.3.5，并更新 2026-06-06 Claude Code source workflow 控制面，记录 L1 seal 通过、release-prep 验证通过以及后续 PR/release/install gate。
summary.why: Claude Code private adapter 与 source-aware retrieval 改动已经由 int_c0ac32dc 提交并 seal；要进入真实发布路径，必须先准备一个高于 registry 当前 0.3.4 的版本，并在 PR 前验证 check/build/pack。

decisions.rationale: npm registry readback 仍是 0.3.4；0.3.5 是下一 patch release，tag/publish 必须等 PR/merge/release gate。
rejected: 本地直接创建 v0.3.5 tag

decisions.chose: 在 release-prep commit 前运行 npm run check、npm run build、npm pack --dry-run。
decisions.rationale: release workflow 会运行 npm ci、npm run check、npm publish；本地 pack/build 先证明 tarball 内容和 dist build 可用。

decisions.chose: 只准备 PR，不 merge/tag/npm publish/install/update global skill。
decisions.rationale: Mainline team stop line 是 review；registry、PATH CLI、global skill 都需要后续 gate 的 live evidence。
rejected: 从当前分支直接 npm publish
把本地 checkout 安装到全局 cxs 或 skill

rejected.reason: 当前变更尚未进入 main/review gate，且缺 tag/merge 后证据。

rejected.alternative: 把 installed PATH CLI 标为已更新
rejected.reason: 未从 registry 安装 0.3.5，也未运行 installed cxs smoke。

acknowledged_constraints.note: completion audit 继续区分 source checkout、npm registry、PATH CLI、global skill。
本 intent 只准备 draft PR 所需版本 bump 和验证，不发布。

review_notes: Registry readback before release: npm view @act0r/cxs version --json returned 0.3.4.
Validation: npm run check passed 28 test files / 178 tests for @act0r/cxs@0.3.5.
Validation: npm run build produced dist/cli.js and post-build completed.
Validation: npm pack --dry-run reported @act0r/cxs@0.3.5 tarball act0r-cxs-0.3.5.tgz containing LICENSE, README.md, dist/cli.js, package.json.
No tag, GitHub Actions release, npm publish, PATH install, or global skill update occurred.

architectural_claims: Release/install state remains separate from checkout source behavior.
security_implications: No credential, auth, or publish operation was performed.
migration_notes: Publishing still requires pushing/merging the PR, creating/pushing v0.3.5 or dispatching release workflow, and verifying npm registry readback.
Installed CLI/global skill update remains after registry publication.
